pi_items.source: Task description directly explicitly states the required trip name
Task description directly explicitly states the required location
Task description directly specifies the required date 'September 10, 2022'
Task description directly explicitly states the required buddy

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on an existing real dataset (`SampleDivesV2.ssrf` from the Subsurface repository) but asks the agent to manually create a synthetic trip and a new dive. The expected trip name is 'Red Sea Liveaboard 2022', location 'Hurghada, Egypt', date '2022-09-10', and dive buddy 'Sara Al-Rashid'. All values are explicitly listed as strings to create in the task prompt.
